problem id: 23f39281
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11010101 -> 01001010
  10011010 -> 00001101
  10101111 -> 00010111
  00100110 -> 00010011
  11100011 -> 10010001
  01010010 -> 00101001
  11100110 -> 00110011
  10111001 -> 11011100

query: 11111101
predicted answer: 01011110
